arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: ص ۚ وَالْقُرْآنِ ذِي الذِّكْرِ
english translation text:
Suad. By the Quran bearing the Reminder,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: بَلِ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا فِي عِزَّةٍ وَشِقَاقٍ
english translation text:
the faithless indeed dwell in conceit and defiance.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
english translation text:
How many a generation We have destroyed before them! They cried out [for help], but gone was the time for escape.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَعَجِبُوا أَن جَاءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ ۖ وَقَالَ الْكَافِرُونَ هَٰذَا سَاحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ
english translation text:
They consider it odd that there should come to them a warner from among themselves, and the faithless say, ‘This is a magician, a mendacious liar.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: أَجَعَلَ الْآلِهَةَ إِلَٰهًا وَاحِدًا ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَيْءٌ عُجَابٌ
english translation text:
‘Has he reduced the gods to one god? This is indeed an odd thing!’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَانطَلَقَ الْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ امْشُوا وَاصْبِرُوا عَلَىٰ آلِهَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَيْءٌ يُرَادُ
english translation text:
Their elite go about [urging others]: ‘Go and stand by your gods! This is indeed the desirable thing [to do].
Saad– Saad

arabic text: مَا سَمِعْنَا بِهَٰذَا فِي الْمِلَّةِ الْآخِرَةِ إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا اخْتِلَاقٌ
english translation text:
We did not hear of this in the latter-day creed. This is nothing but a fabrication.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: أَأُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ الذِّكْرُ مِن بَيْنِنَا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِي شَكٍّ مِّن ذِكْرِي ۖ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُوا عَذَابِ
english translation text:
Has the Reminder been sent down to him out of [all of] us?’ Indeed, they are in doubt concerning My Reminder. Indeed, they have not yet tasted My punishment.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَائِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ الْعَزِيزِ الْوَهَّابِ
english translation text:
Do they possess the treasuries of the mercy of your Lord, the All-mighty, the All-munificent?
Saad– Saad

arabic text: أَمْ لَهُم مُّلْكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ فَلْيَرْتَقُوا فِي الْأَسْبَابِ
english translation text:
Do they own the kingdom of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them? [If so,] let them ascend [to the higher spheres] by the means [of ascension].
Saad– Saad

arabic text: جُندٌ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌ مِّنَ الْأَحْزَابِ
english translation text:
[They are but] a host routed out there of the factions.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو الْأَوْتَادِ
english translation text:
Before them Noah’s people impugned [their apostle] and [so did the people of] ‘Ad, and Pharaoh, the Impaler [of his victims],
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ وَأَصْحَابُ الْأَيْكَةِ ۚ أُولَٰئِكَ الْأَحْزَابُ
english translation text:
and Thamud, and the people of Lot, and the inhabitants of Aykah: those were the factions.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ الرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
english translation text:
There was not any one but such as impugned the apostles; so My retribution became due [against them].
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَٰؤُلَاءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍ
english translation text:
These [too] do not await but a single Cry, which will not grant [them] any respite.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَقَالُوا رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ الْحِسَابِ
english translation text:
They say, ‘Our Lord! Hasten on for us our share before the Day of Reckoning.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: اصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَاذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا دَاوُودَ ذَا الْأَيْدِ ۖ إِنَّهُ أَوَّابٌ
english translation text:
Be patient over what they say, and remember Our servant, David, [the man] of strength. Indeed he was a penitent [soul].
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِنَّا سَخَّرْنَا الْجِبَالَ مَعَهُ يُسَبِّحْنَ بِالْعَشِيِّ وَالْإِشْرَاقِ
english translation text:
We disposed the mountains to glorify [Allah] with him at evening and dawn,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَالطَّيْرَ مَحْشُورَةً ۖ كُلٌّ لَّهُ أَوَّابٌ
english translation text:
and the birds [as well], mustered [in flocks]; all echoing him [in a chorus].
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَشَدَدْنَا مُلْكَهُ وَآتَيْنَاهُ الْحِكْمَةَ وَفَصْلَ الْخِطَابِ
english translation text:
We consolidated his kingdom and gave him wisdom and conclusive speech.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَهَلْ أَتَاكَ نَبَأُ الْخَصْمِ إِذْ تَسَوَّرُوا الْمِحْرَابَ
english translation text:
Has there not come to you the account of the contenders, when they scaled the wall into the sanctuary?
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِذْ دَخَلُوا عَلَىٰ دَاوُودَ فَفَزِعَ مِنْهُمْ ۖ قَالُوا لَا تَخَفْ ۖ خَصْمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعْضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ فَاحْكُم بَيْنَنَا بِالْحَقِّ وَلَا تُشْطِطْ وَاهْدِنَا إِلَىٰ سَوَاءِ الصِّرَاطِ
english translation text:
When they entered into the presence of David, he was alarmed by them. They said, ‘Do not be afraid. [We are only] two contenders: one of us has bullied the other. So judge justly between us, and do not exceed [the bounds of justice], and show us the right path.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا أَخِي لَهُ تِسْعٌ وَتِسْعُونَ نَعْجَةً وَلِيَ نَعْجَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ فَقَالَ أَكْفِلْنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِي فِي الْخِطَابِ
english translation text:
‘This brother of mine has ninety-nine ewes, while I have only a single ewe, and [yet] he says, ‘Commit it to my care,’ and he browbeats me in speech.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ لَقَدْ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعْجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِ ۖ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرًا مِّنَ الْخُلَطَاءِ لَيَبْغِي بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ وَقَلِيلٌ مَّا هُمْ ۗ
english translation text:
He said, ‘He has certainly wronged you by asking your ewe in addition to his own ewes, and indeed many partners bully one another, except such as have
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَظَنَّ دَاوُودُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّاهُ فَاسْتَغْفَرَ رَبَّهُ وَخَرَّ رَاكِعًا وَأَنَابَ ۩
english translation text:
Then David knew that We had tested him, whereat he pleaded with his Lord for forgiveness, and fell down in prostration and repented.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: فَغَفَرْنَا لَهُ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَهُ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَآبٍ
english translation text:
So We forgave him that, and indeed he has [a station of] nearness with Us and a good destination.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: يَا دَاوُودُ إِنَّا جَعَلْنَاكَ خَلِيفَةً فِي الْأَرْضِ فَاحْكُم بَيْنَ النَّاسِ بِالْحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ الْهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ۚ
english translation text:
‘O David! Indeed, We have made you a vicegerent on the earth. So judge between people with justice, and do not follow your desires, or they will lead you astray from the way of Allah.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ شَدِيدٌ بِمَا نَسُوا يَوْمَ الْحِسَابِ
english translation text:
Indeed there is a severe punishment for those who stray from the way of Allah, because of their forgetting the Day of Reckoning.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا السَّمَاءَ وَالْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا بَاطِلًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ظَنُّ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا ۚ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِنَ النَّارِ
english translation text:
We did not create the sky and the earth and whatever is between them in vain. That is a conjecture of the faithless. So woe to the faithless for the Fire!
Saad– Saad

arabic text: أَمْ نَجْعَلُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ كَالْمُفْسِدِينَ فِي الْأَرْضِ أَمْ نَجْعَلُ الْمُتَّقِينَ كَالْفُجَّارِ
english translation text:
Shall We treat those who have faith and do righteous deeds like those who cause corruption on the earth? Shall We treat the Godwary like the vicious?
Saad– Saad

arabic text: كِتَابٌ أَنزَلْنَاهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَارَكٌ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوا آيَاتِهِ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ
english translation text:
[This is] a blessed Book that We have sent down to you, so that they may contemplate its signs, and that those who possess intellect may take admonition.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَوَهَبْنَا لِدَاوُودَ سُلَيْمَانَ ۚ نِعْمَ الْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُ أَوَّابٌ
english translation text:
And to David We gave Solomon—what an excellent servant he was! Indeed, he was a penitent [soul].
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِذْ عُرِضَ عَلَيْهِ بِالْعَشِيِّ الصَّافِنَاتُ الْجِيَادُ
english translation text:
One evening when there were displayed before him prancing steeds,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: فَقَالَ إِنِّي أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ الْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّي حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِالْحِجَابِ
english translation text:
he said, ‘Indeed I have preferred the love of [worldly] niceties to the remembrance of my Lord until [the sun] disappeared behind the [night’s] veil.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: رُدُّوهَا عَلَيَّ ۖ فَطَفِقَ مَسْحًا بِالسُّوقِ وَالْأَعْنَاقِ
english translation text:
‘Bring it back for me!’ Then he [and others] began to wipe [their] legs and necks.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمَانَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
english translation text:
Certainly We tried Solomon, and cast a [lifeless] body on his throne. Thereupon he was penitent.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَهَبْ لِي مُلْكًا لَّا يَنبَغِي لِأَحَدٍ مِّن بَعْدِي ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْوَهَّابُ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Forgive me, and grant me a kingdom that will not befit anyone except me. Indeed You are the All-munificent.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ الرِّيحَ تَجْرِي بِأَمْرِهِ رُخَاءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ
english translation text:
So We disposed the wind for him, blowing softly wherever he intended by his command,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَالشَّيَاطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّاءٍ وَغَوَّاصٍ
english translation text:
and every builder and diver from the demons,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَآخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِي الْأَصْفَادِ
english translation text:
and others [too] bound together in chains.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: هَٰذَا عَطَاؤُنَا فَامْنُنْ أَوْ أَمْسِكْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
english translation text:
‘This is Our bounty: so withhold or bestow without any reckoning.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَإِنَّ لَهُ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَآبٍ
english translation text:
Indeed he has [a station of] nearness with Us and a good destination.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَاذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الشَّيْطَانُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
english translation text:
And remember Our servant Job [in the Quran]. When he called out to his Lord, ‘The devil has visited on me hardship and torment,’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: ارْكُضْ بِرِجْلِكَ ۖ هَٰذَا مُغْتَسَلٌ بَارِدٌ وَشَرَابٌ
english translation text:
[We told him:] ‘Stamp your foot on the ground; this [ensuing spring] will be a cooling bath and drink.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ أَهْلَهُ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ
english translation text:
We gave [back] his family to him along with others like them, as a mercy from Us and an admonition for those who possess intellect.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَاضْرِب بِّهِ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ ۗ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَاهُ صَابِرًا ۚ نِّعْمَ الْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُ أَوَّابٌ
english translation text:
[We told him:] ‘Take a faggot in your hand and then strike [your wife] with it, but do not break [your] oath.’ Indeed, We found him to be patient. What an excellent servant! Indeed he was a penitent [soul].
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَاذْكُرْ عِبَادَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَإِسْحَاقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ أُولِي الْأَيْدِي وَالْأَبْصَارِ
english translation text:
And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob, men of strength and insight.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِنَّا أَخْلَصْنَاهُم بِخَالِصَةٍ ذِكْرَى الدَّارِ
english translation text:
Indeed We purified them with exclusive remembrance of the abode [of the Hereafter].
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَإِنَّهُمْ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ الْمُصْطَفَيْنَ الْأَخْيَارِ
english translation text:
Indeed they are surely with Us among the elect of the best.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَاذْكُرْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ وَالْيَسَعَ وَذَا الْكِفْلِ ۖ وَكُلٌّ مِّنَ الْأَخْيَارِ
english translation text:
And remember Ishmael, Elisha and Dhu’l-Kifl—each [of whom was] among the elect.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: هَٰذَا ذِكْرٌ ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسْنَ مَآبٍ
english translation text:
This is a Reminder, and indeed the Godwary have a good destination:
Saad– Saad

arabic text: جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ مُّفَتَّحَةً لَّهُمُ الْأَبْوَابُ
english translation text:
the Gardens of Eden, whose gates will be flung open for them.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: مُتَّكِئِينَ فِيهَا يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَاكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ وَشَرَابٍ
english translation text:
Reclining therein [on couches], they will call for abundant fruits and drinks,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَعِندَهُمْ قَاصِرَاتُ الطَّرْفِ أَتْرَابٌ
english translation text:
and there will be with them maidens of restrained glances, of a like age.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوْمِ الْحِسَابِ
english translation text:
This is what you are promised on the Day of Reckoning.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُ مِن نَّفَادٍ
english translation text:
This is Our provision, which will never be exhausted.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: هَٰذَا ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّاغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَآبٍ
english translation text:
This [will be for the righteous], and as for the rebellious there will surely be a bad destination:
Saad– Saad

arabic text: جَهَنَّمَ يَصْلَوْنَهَا فَبِئْسَ الْمِهَادُ
english translation text:
hell, which they shall enter, an evil resting place.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: هَٰذَا فَلْيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٌ وَغَسَّاقٌ
english translation text:
[They will be told, ‘This is scalding water and pus; let them taste it,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَآخَرُ مِن شَكْلِهِ أَزْوَاجٌ
english translation text:
and other kinds [of torments] resembling it.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: هَٰذَا فَوْجٌ مُّقْتَحِمٌ مَّعَكُمْ ۖ لَا مَرْحَبًا بِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ صَالُو النَّارِ
english translation text:
[The leaders of the faithless will be told,] ‘This is a group [of your followers] plunging [into hell] along with you.’ [They will repond,] ‘May wretchedness be their lot! For they will enter the Fire.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالُوا بَلْ أَنتُمْ لَا مَرْحَبًا بِكُمْ ۖ أَنتُمْ قَدَّمْتُمُوهُ لَنَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ الْقَرَارُ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘No, may wretchedness be your lot! You prepared this [hell] for us. What an evil abode!’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالُوا رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَٰذَا فَزِدْهُ عَذَابًا ضِعْفًا فِي النَّارِ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘Our Lord! Whoever has prepared this for us, double his punishment in the Fire!’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَقَالُوا مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالًا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ الْأَشْرَارِ
english translation text:
And they will say, ‘Why is it that we do not see [here] men whom we used to count among the bad ones,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: أَتَّخَذْنَاهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا أَمْ زَاغَتْ عَنْهُمُ الْأَبْصَارُ
english translation text:
ridiculing them, or do [our] eyes miss them [here]?’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقٌّ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ النَّارِ
english translation text:
That is indeed a true account of the contentions of the inmates of the Fire.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَنَا مُنذِرٌ ۖ وَمَا مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهَّارُ
english translation text:
Say, ‘I am just a warner, and there is no god except Allah, the One, the All-paramount,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا الْعَزِيزُ الْغَفَّارُ
english translation text:
the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the All-mighty, the All-forgiver.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قُلْ هُوَ نَبَأٌ عَظِيمٌ
english translation text:
Say, ‘It is a great prophesy,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: أَنتُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ
english translation text:
of which you are disregardful.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: مَا كَانَ لِيَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ بِالْمَلَإِ الْأَعْلَىٰ إِذْ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
english translation text:
I have no knowledge of the Supernal Elite when they contend.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِن يُوحَىٰ إِلَيَّ إِلَّا أَنَّمَا أَنَا نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
All that is revealed to me is that I am just a manifest warner.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِّن طِينٍ
english translation text:
When your Lord said to the angels, ‘Indeed I am about to create a human being out of clay.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُوا لَهُ سَاجِدِينَ
english translation text:
So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My spirit, then fall down in prostration before him.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: فَسَجَدَ الْمَلَائِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
english translation text:
Thereat the angels prostrated, all of them together,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ اسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ
english translation text:
but not Iblis; he acted arrogantly and he was one of the faithless.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ يَا إِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَيَّ ۖ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ الْعَالِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘O Iblis! What keeps you from prostrating before that which I have created with My [own] two hands? Are you arrogant, or are you one of the exalted ones?’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ أَنَا خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ ۖ خَلَقْتَنِي مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُ مِن طِينٍ
english translation text:
‘I am better than him,’ he said. ‘You created me from fire and You created him from clay.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ فَاخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Begone hence, for you are indeed an outcast,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ لَعْنَتِي إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
english translation text:
and indeed My curse will be on you till the Day of Retribution.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِي إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Respite me till the day they will be resurrected.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ الْمُنظَرِينَ
english translation text:
Said He, ‘You are indeed among the reprieved
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ الْوَقْتِ الْمَعْلُومِ
english translation text:
until the day of the known time.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘By Your might, I will surely pervert them,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ الْمُخْلَصِينَ
english translation text:
except Your exclusive servants among them.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قَالَ فَالْحَقُّ وَالْحَقَّ أَقُولُ
english translation text:
Said He, ‘The truth is that—and I speak the truth—
Saad– Saad

arabic text: لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
I will surely fill hell with you and all those who follow you.’
Saad– Saad

arabic text: قُلْ مَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
english translation text:
Say, ‘I do not ask you any reward for it, and I am no impostor.
Saad– Saad

arabic text: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
It is just a reminder for all the nations,
Saad– Saad

arabic text: وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُ بَعْدَ حِينٍ
english translation text:
and you will surely learn its tidings in due time.’
Saad– Saad
